title: Bad Romance
synopsis: A man returns to Lagos with a wealthy fiancée and a plan to steal her fortune. His family welcomes her, but their smiles hide a con. As the facade cracks, hidden identities and jealousies turn the home into a pressure cooker of deception.

title: Birdie
synopsis: In 1970, a 16-year-old Nigerian refugee in Virginia tries to keep her family together when a newcomer draws her sister away.

title: Crocodile
synopsis: In Nigeria, the young art-collective The Critics, armed with makeshift gear, conjures homemade sci-fi spectacles, chronicling their reality while blasting into wild imagined worlds.

title: Dear Dija
synopsis: Two teenagers find love and quickly discover the chaos that comes with it.
tagline: OPPOSITE ATTRACTS... CHAOS

title: Hear me
synopsis: Kunle and Soroichi, two lover just coming from a night out, listen to their neighbors fight, which starts out funny. Until the conversation bleeds into  their personal lives, and they argue about their relationship and what the  future of it looks like. What starts as an alien argument between strangers becomes a fuel that threatens the lives of this young couple, and their future becomes a question of existentialism.
tagline: When a couple's fun night turns serious

title: ìfé: (The Sequel)
synopsis: ìfé: (The Sequel) picks up from the events of the first film, with two women, Ife and Adaora, crossing paths again, years apart from their past passionate dalliance. Adaora has settled comfortably into domestic life with her husband, while Ife found love in South Africa. However, all of this threatens to fall apart when the pair reconnect unexpectedly at a Lagos book store. The film unfolds as an exploration of love, choice, and identity in Nigeria. It is an intimate and political look at the universal longing for connection and the courage it takes to live authentically.

title: Lady
synopsis: In the sprawling African metropolis of Lagos, a fiercely independent young cab driver meets a band of radiantly reckless sex workers whose sisterhood pulls her into danger and joy, setting her on a journey toward her own transformation.
tagline: Sisterhood is freedom.

title: Love & New Notes
synopsis: A couple expecting a child makes the drastic decision to attempt a robbery, finding themselves out of their depth with the homeowners they try to steal from.

title: Onobiren
synopsis: ‘Onobiren: A Woman’s Story,’ follows Roli, a young woman who arrives in Lagos from Warri under the shadow of tradition and expectation. What begins as a familiar narrative quickly transforms when she chooses a different path, one driven by purpose, survival, and self-discovery.
tagline: A Woman's Story

title: Onobiren
synopsis: ‘Onobiren: A Woman’s Story,’ follows Roli, a young woman who arrives in Lagos from Warri under the shadow of tradition and expectation. What begins as a familiar narrative quickly transforms when she chooses a different path, one driven by purpose, survival, and self-discovery.
tagline: A Woman's Story

title: The Foreigner
synopsis: The film follows Martins, escaping a dangerous past that endangers his life, as fate draws him to fiery Anabelle—stuck in an abusive nightmare. Sparks fly amid tension, but his secrets summon a deadly assassin. Will love defy the hunt?
tagline: From shadowed pasts to fiery fate—can love escape the chase?

title: Three Hearts One Night
synopsis: A celebratory 30th birthday reunion descends into chaos when a violent confrontation leaves a guest unconscious. Haunted by past secrets and a dark obsession, the group must find the truth before the night ends. Who among them is the guilty party?
tagline: The truth is meant to be revealed

title: Unearthly
synopsis: Two brothers move silently through the mundane world, carrying an unseen offering of light. As they journey from place to place, dancing and observing, subtle traces of change begin to appear, revealing how quiet presence can shift everything.
tagline: A new beginning

title: 2 + 1 Girls
synopsis: Jane is part of a trio of friends that do all kinds of dirty jobs to make ends meet, but things go awry when her fiancé's custom necklace is stolen.

title: 3 Cold Dishes
synopsis: Esosa, Fatouma, and Giselle, three women trafficked as teenagers who reunite seventeen years later to dismantle the powerful men behind their pain. From the streets of Lagos to the shadows of Abidjan and Cotonou, they execute a cold, calculated mission, each move sharpened by trauma, sisterhood, and strategy.
tagline: The past returns cold.

title: 70 X 7
synopsis: A woman and her priest meet and have a conversation about the nature forgiveness.

title: A Body in Metaphor
synopsis: A contemplation on the role of women's bodies in African cinema.

title: A Lagos Love Story
synopsis: When she's hired to plan a huge festival in Lagos, Promise unexpectedly finds herself falling for the brash Afrobeats star at the center of it all.

title: A Love Like Raymond
synopsis: In this gripping story, a young girl falls deeply in love with a man named Raymond, believing in his sincerity and good intentions. However, as their relationship develops, she begins to uncover hidden motives beneath Raymond's charm.  With compelling performances and an engaging storyline, this film invites viewers to reflect on the true nature of love and the importance of understanding God’s plan in our relationships. Will the girl uncover Raymond’s hidden truths in time? Can love survive when trust is shaken?

title: A Very Dirty Christmas
synopsis: When their sister leaves a mysterious voice note before disappearing, two women go undercover to track her down
tagline: One holiday. Too many secrets.

title: After 30
synopsis: Four Nigerian women over 30 navigate love, friendship, and societal pressure to settle down. Balancing careers, growth, and evolving relationships, they challenge norms in a world that often defines women by status. A compelling drama about modern women redefining life on their own terms.

title: Amanyanabo: The Eagle King
synopsis: Tamunoba the goddess appears to Ibanichuka a carefree warrior and against the norm pronounces him the king of Okrika. In a cryptic warning, the goddess advises him to show true strength in the face of his greatest adversary in order to save his people from annihilation. His interpretation of her message leads to conquests, alliances and even a civil war with an influential member of his war cabinet, all these while trying to unite a people already divided by the Christian religion led by the wily Chief Ogan wielding his own supremacist agenda. When Ibanichuka eventually discovers his greatest adversary, he realizes to his shock that he had been on a wrong trajectory after all and is forced to make the decision that no true warrior should ever make.

title: Bam Bam
synopsis: When Babatunde, a gifted but shy teenager, falls in love for the first time, he turns to Bam Bam, his strange, all-knowing friend, for advice. But as Bam Bam’s guidance leads him deeper into unfamiliar territory, Babatunde must decide if his friend truly understands what it means to be human.

title: Behind The Scenes
synopsis: Aderonke “Ronky-Fella” Faniran, a mother of two and successful real estate mogul, is loved for her generosity. But as everyone around her grows to expect her kindness, she gives until there’s nothing left, neglecting herself in the process.
tagline: Who are you when no one is watching

title: Breastmilk
synopsis: A new Nigerian mother, Aduke, struggles to breastfeed her baby while navigating her tense relationship with her husband as well as her family’s expectations. In order to support her newborn child, she must confront her past.

title: By The Riverside
synopsis: Contravening local traditions, a mother manages to revive her drowned child. Alas, this fleeting reprieve comes at a high price when a dark spirit possesses the girl. Will love save the day or become the greatest curse?

title: Contract Love Wahala
synopsis: A lively Igbo village romantic comedy-drama that followed three close friends Nneka, Ogechi, and Oluchi, who's dreams were getting married to a rich husband and escaping their village traumas. Their fantasies seem to come true when Martins, a charming,flashy contractor arrives to build a community hall. Handsomely and smooth-talking he secretly began to date the ladies, deceitfully Martins promises the ladies marriage enslaving them upon a dream that will never come, but hell break loose we the ladies noticed what was going on right beneath their nose and the reverse became the case.

title: Crushed
synopsis: Their creative journeys at a standstill, a photographer and an actress form an unexpected bond.

title: Dead Tide
synopsis: After losing his sister, Itoro seeks a peaceful life by the beach, but his when Sade mistakenly films the president's son Dare committing murder and finds refuge in Itoro's bar, he must outsmart their pursuers and seek justice.

title: Deadly Approval
synopsis: Christiana, a determined university student, faces a dark spiral of challenges when her supervisor demands an unethical favor for her project approval, leaving her homeless and unsupported.

title: Dust to Dreams
synopsis: Set against the backdrop of Lagos, Nigeria, the plot examines the relationship  between a mother and her teenage daughter as she meets her father for the first time.
tagline: Regret, love, and a chance at redemption.

title: Èwò
synopsis: When the king dies and his corpse vanishes—stolen by the fleeing queen—the kingdom must recover the body before sunset to complete a sacred ritual and crown a new ruler, or face an ancient curse.

title: F1
synopsis: Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.
tagline: Let's ride.

title: Finding Nina
synopsis: Photographer JB returns to Northern Nigeria, where a photo of his childhood love sparks a surreal journey of memory, healing, and self-discovery.

title: First Day
synopsis: Naive, anxious Julia’s first day of school takes a sharp turn: will she brace up or break down?

title: For Ikemafuna
synopsis: A South African woman working in Nigeria is in the crossfire at the heat of a Xenophobic Attack on a Nigerian business man in South Africa.

title: Fractured Intimacy
synopsis: A young couple's marriage is on the brink of collapse when the wife discovers her husband's secret struggle with arousal. As they seek therapy, a shocking revelation emerges: the husband's past childhood trauma is the root cause of his intimacy issues. Can they overcome this painful truth and rebuild their relationship?
tagline: A husband's hidden struggle with arousal exposes a deeper wound, forcing the couple to confront the traumatic past that's threatening their marriage.

title: Gingerrr
synopsis: When a high-stakes heist becomes their only hope of escape from the life they know to the life they want, four women with nothing to lose, brought together by fate, must take a stand! Bound by a shared vendetta, they join forces to pull off a daring heist, but their alliance is tested when each one reveals a hidden agenda to betray the others.
tagline: Chaos comes alive.

title: Go Ye Afar
synopsis: A Nigerian taxi driver and his passenger go on a miraculous voyage through the streets of Dublin and Calabar.
tagline: Is this your car?

title: Greg's Regret
synopsis: Infidelity and control lead to dramatic consequences for Greg, causing strain on his family. Trust, redemption and family dynamics are explored.

title: Gwoza
synopsis: Bami, a woman who fled forced marriage and built a new life in Lagos. After a tragic insurgent attack in her hometown, she returns, loses her husband and risks everything to rescue a kidnapped girl, finding healing through courage.

title: Her Excellency
synopsis: A power-hungry First Lady's quest for control unravels when a murder investigation threatens to expose the deadly secrets behind her glamorous facade.

title: How Love Comes
synopsis: A young woman discovers a shocking betrothal arranged by her late parents to settle debts. Caught between a suitor she was promised to and a manipulative lover who lied to her, she must unravel a web of lies and make a life-altering choice.

title: Imported Wives
synopsis: Not everything that glitters is gold, and sometimes, what appears to be a perfect marriage hides a complex web of love, opportunity, and the pursuit of a better life.

title: Ireke: Rise of the Maroons
synopsis: Betrayed by his uncle and sold into slavery, a young West African prince finds himself on a brutal Jamaican plantation, where a forbidden love and a looming rebellion draw him into an alliance with escaped slaves – the Maroons – forcing him to rise as the leader of a revolution that could shake the colonial world.
tagline: Stolen from a kingdom. Forged in chains. Destined to rise.

title: Karma
synopsis: Drawing on the experiences of undocumented migrants, KARMA explores the emotional and moral dilemmas they face and ultimately celebrates the transformative power of truth and compassion. This Nollywood drama, filmed in Frankfurt, Benin City, and Lagos, revolves around themes such as love, deception, justice, and redemption.

title: Katangari Goes to Town
synopsis: Quirky "Katangari", a Retired Police Inspector and legendary sleuth is called to Abuja to investigate the murder of his international businesssman cousin, Chief Bello Gyang. Suspects include Bello's family friends and associates all confined in his beautiful mansion until the culprit can be identified.
tagline: When justice calls, Katangiri answers-unleashed and unstoppable.

title: Labake Olododo
synopsis: Set against the rich backdrop of Yoruba tradition, a courageous woman rises against oppression in her community. As she fights for justice, she must navigate political schemes, betrayal, and the weight of tradition.

title: Landline
synopsis: A stranded military sergeant receives eerie calls from an old landline, each guiding him to save his pregnant wife from a relentless killer—only to watch her die again and again in a nightmarish loop.
tagline: No Matter How Much He Tries, She Always Dies

title: Lisabi: A Legend is Born
synopsis: The epic tale of the birth and rise of legendary folk hero Lísàbí Agbongbo-Akala, destined to save the Egba people in the face of a treacherous leader.

title: Mama Balo
synopsis: For many, a toilet cleaner’s work might seem invisible, but for Mama Balo at the College of Medicine, University of Lagos students hostel, it’s a role she approaches with unmatched care and purpose. In this documentary, "Mama Balo" directors Hassan Yahaya and Kayode Idowu follow her daily routines, shining a light on how she finds pride and meaning in what many consider an “unimportant” job. Through her story, we see the extraordinary dedication behind the work that keeps overlooked spaces functional and dignified.

title: MASOKO NA MABELE
synopsis: As Theodora and London publish their latest hit, the music notes break free. Through a glitching metropolis to the jazz bar, they dodge across multiverses to reclaim what belongs to them.
tagline: LES FESSES ET LES SEINS. LES FESSES AU SOL.

title: Mother's Love
synopsis: Adebisi, a young woman from a wealthy family, has her life shattered by her father's controlling grip. Finally allowed to experience freedom through the NYSC program, she embarks on a journey of self-discovery, befriending a young man from a humble background who challenges her perspectives. As she begins to find her voice and assert her independence, her father's wrath looms large. In a desperate bid to protect her daughter, Adebisi's seemingly docile mother reveals a depth of strength and determination, confronting the secrets and lies that have defined their family's dynamics. As the mother's hidden narrative unfolds, the film exposes the complexities of mother-daughter relationships, unresolved grief, and the struggle for individuality.

title: Ms. Kanyin
synopsis: Amara's mistake awakens Madame Koi-Koi. Now she and Mr. Mustapha must stop the vengeful spirit before it's too late.

title: MUSCLE
synopsis: Artist and filmmaker Karimah Ashadu presents an intimate portrait of body builders in the heart of Lagos’ slums striving to attain a hyper-masculine ideal, continuing the artist’s research into issues of socio-economic independence and patriarchy within the context of West African culture and society.

title: My Body, God's Temple
synopsis: Omasilu and Zion are a newlywed couple who must unlearn everything they've been taught about intimacy, desire, and faith when they struggle to consummate their marriage.

title: My Father's Shadow
synopsis: Two young brothers explore Lagos with their estranged father during the 1993 Nigerian election crisis, witnessing both the city's magnitude and their father's daily struggles as political unrest threatens their journey home.

title: Obi Is A Boy
synopsis: A femme-presenting young man returns home for his mother’s funeral and is forced to navigate the violence and gender expectations that have shaped his fractured relationship with his father and his place in the community.

title: One Woman Film
synopsis: A cam girl sets up a camera to record herself cooking, blurring the lines between performance and intimacy as she unravels intrusive thoughts while waiting for her date to arrive.

title: One Woman One Bra
synopsis: In a rural village, an orphaned girl named Star races against time to prove her family lineage and claim her land deed, facing obstacles from hostile neighbors and shady organizations while unexpectedly finding romance along the way.

title: Ori Rebirth
synopsis: Tormented by dark nightmares and shrouded in a forgotten past, a woman embarks on a perilous journey to unlock her true potential and reclaim the heritage that's hers.
tagline: Destiny comes at a price.

title: Osamede
synopsis: In the Benin Empire of 1897, an orphan girl discovers she holds the power of the sacred Aruosa stone. As the Oba faces British conquest and betrayal from within, she must embrace her destiny to save the kingdom.

title: Our Bodies, Nigeria's Ghosts
synopsis: A poetic exploration of how colonialism lives on in bodies and communities, merging documentary, memoir, and reimagined archives.

title: Out in the Darkness
synopsis: Bolu, a new mother, struggles with her mental health after the birth of her second child. She is plagued by vivid visions and hallucinations that threaten to destroy her grip on reality.

title: Oversabi Aunty
synopsis: A zealous church usher's mission to "fix" everyone backfires as her moral crusade wreaks havoc on family life, culminating at a wedding introduction that forces her to face the consequences of her religious fervor.

title: Owambe Thieves
synopsis: A struggling married couple take a desperate gamble for survival. Their decision pulls them into a dangerous web of power, betrayal, and consequences they never saw coming.

title: Project Assault
synopsis: On his last night as DPO, CSP Wale Savage faces a deadly siege by gang leader Shina, seeking revenge for his brother's death. With downed officers, dwindling ammunition, and escalating chaos, Wale must choose between upholding the law or joining the prisoners to survive.

title: Red Circle
synopsis: Fikayo Holloway, a journalist from a wealthy socialite family, is on the verge of uncovering a powerful crime ring in Lagos, whose atrocities have hit close to home.

title: Reel Love
synopsis: 'Reel Love' tells the story of a love triangle while exploring themes of love, culture, and the beauty of embracing life's unexpected twists. It's a heartfelt narrative that dissects the complexities of relationships and the transformative power of love.

title: Saint Siméon
synopsis: A tightly woven short drama set in Nigeria, Saint Siméon follows a character portrayed by Nollywood legend Kanayo O. Kanayo as he confronts the tensions between tradition, familial duty, and generational change. Through emotional interplay and cultural symbolism, the story captures the pressures facing a community at a crossroads.

title: Say Who Die
synopsis: The tale of a set of twins whose bond is tested by secrets, family dysfunction, and choices that spiral into chaos.

title: Silas Wan Japa
synopsis: The tale of one man's desperate attempts to leave Nigeria by any means necessary.

title: Sin: First Blood
synopsis: Tosin Shina, a glamorous Lagos socialite and nightclub owner, sees her perfect life shatter when her husband is arrested as a top drug trafficker. With her wealth gone and children to protect, she’s forced to rebuild. But when a deadly cartel demands she take over her husband’s operations, Tosin must navigate crime, betrayal, and survival—or lose everything.

title: Small Steps
synopsis: A short film by Tea & reflection addressing mental health issues in students.

title: Son of the Soil
synopsis: Nigerian soldier Zion Ladejo, haunted by his past, returns home after his sister's tragic death. Determined to uncover those responsible, he embarks on a vengeful path, while seeking redemption for his own actions.

title: Suky
synopsis: In this grim and unforgiving environment, Suky discovers a glimmer of hope, a brutal underground fight club that promises freedom to the strongest. With nothing to lose and revenge fueling his every move, Suky must fight not only for his life but for a chance to reclaim his freedom.

title: Supernowa
synopsis: "Super" Nowa Ohini, a gifted 12-year-old who prefers to stay unseen, is pushed into a major competition by a new teacher and her brother. To move forward, she must confront the taunting figure born from her anxiety and decide whether to keep hiding or finally step into her own light.
tagline: Deep breath in...

title: Tarella
synopsis: In this Cinderella story set in a mythical West African kingdom. The prince, heir to the throne, and an orphaned maiden, must overcome numerous obstacles in their quest to find true love.

title: Tears of the Night
synopsis: A young lady moves to Lagos to restart her life when she finds herself in a life-threatening situation. Her encounter throws at her a dagger of two edges; her decisions and choices brings a turn that changes all for both herself and the intruder.

title: The Benefactor
synopsis: Tuntunlade, a breakout star on the cusp of fame. But when a man who once helped launch her career makes an impossible demand of her and she refuses to play along, a broader web of complicity begins to unravel.

title: The Breakpoint
synopsis: To save her mother's life, Telema finds herself in a living nightmare that pushes her to a breaking point that changes the lives of everyone involved. The mental health impacts of gender based violence shape the world of The Breakpoint.
tagline: When boundaries blur, the battle for humanity begins.

title: The Fire and the Moth
synopsis: Violence and mayhem ensue after a smuggler escapes with a rare Ife bronze head into a gritty western Nigerian town.
tagline: They sow the wind and reap the whirlwind.

title: The Herd
synopsis: While privately dealing with his wife's recurrent cancer scare, Gosi joins his friends to celebrate their wedding. Things take a drastic turn when, on their way back to the hotel, they are kidnapped by gunmen disguised as cattle herdsmen.

title: The Lekan I Know
synopsis: When silence isn't an option, courage becomes the only choice.

title: The Lost Days
synopsis: After being declared cancer-free, Chisom Agu embarks on a journey to reunite with the man she once loved and the child she left behind. But as buried secrets surface, she discovers that the past is far more complicated-and dangerous.

title: The Lost Days
synopsis: After being declared cancer-free, Chisom Agu embarks on a journey to reunite with the man she once loved and the child she left behind. But as buried secrets surface, she discovers that the past is far more complicated-and dangerous.
tagline: Life gave them another chance at love.

title: The Noise Around Her Black
synopsis: Against the backdrop of Nigerian burial traditions, a widow and her three children struggle with the noise of public spectacle that isolates them in their private grief.

title: The Travails of Ajadi
synopsis: Ajadi, a weathered man shaped by years of toil, is caught in a storm while out fishing and thrown into the ocean. He drifts unconscious to awaken in an in-between state in a strange metaphysical space where the sea is calm, the sky unnatural, and a mysterious voice calls his name.

title: Thicker Than Water
synopsis: Photojournalist Ese arrives in Ibeshe to find her missing sister and uncovers a journal leading to a dark mystery involving supernatural forces and a ritual killing ring.

title: True Affection
synopsis: Sewa, a young woman living in Lagos who is constantly interrogated by her friends and family about her prolonged lack of romantic relationships, seems to find a suitable admirer, but a strange presence in her dreams complicates the matter.

title: Unburied
synopsis: A haunting Nigerian drama about Alex, a non-binary person from a conservative Yoruba family and strict Pentecostal community. Rejected by family, condemned by religion, and hunted by societal transphobia, Alex journeys through a dark, metaphorical forest haunted by a masquerade symbolizing fear and erasure. Blending suspense and the supernatural, the film powerfully explores identity, resilience, and the struggle to live authentically, while advocating for acceptance and the right to selfhood.

title: Voices of Resilience
synopsis: Voices of Resilience follows the lives of queer individuals and drug users living with HIV in Nigeria. Through personal interviews and experimental visual storytelling, the film shows the protagonists’ worlds as they seek out underground harm reduction services.

title: Warlord: Olori Ogun
synopsis: When a tyrant bound to a bloodthirsty spirit tightens his grip on the land through slavery, a fearless challenger rises, unleashing a storm of blades, betrayal, and supernatural fury in the fight to reclaim freedom and destiny.

title: When Nigeria Happens
synopsis: Misfit dancers Fagbo, Pokko, Lighter, Movement, Colos, and Poppy are bound by art and friendship. When Fagbo's mother falls ill, their world shifts, testing their dreams, loyalty, and what it means to fight for a future in Nigeria.

title: Where Love Lives
synopsis: Demilade is ecstatic to find out her husband has purchased her a luxurious home, but things get complicated when she starts interacting with her neighbors.

title: Yeni
synopsis: Driven by poverty and rejection, brilliant but broken Yeni misuses his only chance to escape hardship. When his actions bring disgrace and loss, he must overcome guilt and regret to reclaim his purpose—a moving story of fall, faith, and redemption.

title: 3 Working Days
synopsis: A desperate man holds up a bank, taking the staff and customer hostage with an ultimatum to process his delayed transaction. Unknown to him, his move has disrupted the plans of a deadly gang that has planned to attack the same bank.

title: A Father's Love
synopsis: A taxi driver, already struggling to support his wife and children, finds an abandoned baby in the back of his cab.
tagline: When Life's Pressures Peak, A Father's Love Endures

title: A Night in 2005
synopsis: What started out as a fun night at a prom after party in 2005, quickly turns into Ife’s worst nightmare. She carries a dark secret from that night into adulthood that continues to plague her everyday life.

title: Able Leader
synopsis: When a failing corporate leader invites a documentary crew to showcase his “efficient” governance, the cameras instead capture a satirical descent into corruption, absurd bureaucracy, and laughable incompetence.
tagline: Behind every failed system is an able leader

title: Adura Baba Mi
synopsis: Intimate recollections by the filmmaker's father, a religious leader within the Celestial Church of Christ, and the filmmaker's mother, his once devoted wife.

title: Ajosepo
synopsis: Ajosepo tells the story of Dapo and Tani, who are about to get married. Dapo hails from a disjointed family, and this looms over the forthcoming wedding as Tani's family are conservative Christians. The film follows the couple as they navigate to keep this secret from coming to light.

title: Akito
synopsis: Lifelong friends Ajoke and Lape, facing hardships, discover a surprising lineage common to them. Their pursuit of change strains family bonds and challenges village perceptions, forcing them to hide their secret at a high cost.

title: All's fair in love
synopsis: They are living the dream – their fashion business is booming, and their friendship bond is unbreakable. That is until they both fall in love with the beautiful Mbali, a woman who enters their lives like a whirlwind. Initially unaware of their feelings, becomes the object of their affection, setting the stage for an intense love triangle.

title: Ancestry
synopsis: Ancestry is a powerful documentary that explores how Two Nigerian Communities Protect Sacred Pythons and Biodiversity from Extinction. The Idemili and Osogbo communities in Nigeria protect sacred pythons and their surrounding biodiversity through indigenous knowledge and spiritual traditions. This film sheds light on the deep connection between culture, conservation, and heritage, revealing how these communities have safeguarded their environment for generations. Ancestry challenges mainstream narratives on wildlife protection, offering a decolonized perspective on African conservation efforts.

title: At Ease
synopsis: An exceptional soldier and leader, Major Agbo leads his special forces team on a mission to successfully rescue hostages from insurgents. However, as the only member of his team to survive the operation, he must now fight his way back

title: Beyond Olympic Glory
synopsis: A young woman from the slums of Bariga, Lagos, Nigeria, defies the odds and pursues her dream of becoming an Olympic boxing champion, but a doping scandal shatters her dreams, forcing her to rebuild her career and reclaim her future.

title: Bruises Behind Closed Doors
synopsis: Bruises Behind Closed Doors takes its audience into the life of Herbert, an abusive husband who has been secretly in with another woman throws his wife, Angel's life completely upside down.
tagline: Herbert becomes aggressive towards his wife, Angel that he beats her at any slight argument. Unknowingly to Angel, he is already going out with another beautiful lady, Alice, who Angel later finds out about.

title: Christmas in Lagos
synopsis: Romance is in the air when the beat drops for Lagos' Detty December. Fiyin is convinced her best friend Elo is the love of her life, but is shocked when he returns home for the holidays with a secret fiancée. Gbemi is torn between her boyfriend and an old flame, while London-raised Ivie seeks a wild holiday but doesn’t count on falling for Ajani.

title: Conversations in transit
synopsis: Three women on a morning train face life-changing choices that force them to confront love, betrayal, and desire as they decide their futures.

title: Dead Serious
synopsis: A romantic comedy starring Nollywood veteran Nkem Owoh. When tragedy strikes, a heartbroken Jonny embarks on hilarious attempts to end his life, but ends up discovering the beauty of life.
tagline: I'm Dead serious!

title: Demon Inside
synopsis: A woman’s word against a man’s: a doctor seeks justice – and vengeance – on a rapist, but the demon inside him is about to surface.
tagline: Chibuike Ibe’s 75-minute Nollywood quick-burn opens with a sexual-assault accusation and never pauses for breath.

title: Demons
synopsis: A London cop returns to Lagos, risking everything to avenge his lover's death, battling corruption and confronting his own demons in a heart-wrenching quest for justice.

title: English
synopsis: The film captures the essence of Success' emotional journey, from being stuck in the past to finding the courage to move forward.
tagline: When the silence becomes deafening, Success, trapped in a world of pain, must find the strength to release his grief and discover a new path forward and break free from the shackles of his past.

title: Everybody Loves Jenifa
synopsis: Jenifa finds her world turned upside down when a new neighbor arrives, winning over the community with his seemingly charitable deeds. As she strives to maintain her authenticity and the trust of those around her, she is drawn into a web of rivalry, unexpected betrayals, and a drug-related controversy that threatens to upend her life. With her signature wit and resilience, Jenifa must navigate the chaos while staying true to who she is.
tagline: What could go wrong?

title: Everything Lasts And Nothing Ends
synopsis: Zainab is in Lagos for two reasons; to spread the word and chop life. Amaka is ready to pack her load and leave the city she has spent her whole life in. The worlds of the two women collide as the spirit of Lagos brings them together and threatens to pull them apart.
tagline: What happens when an unstoppable force meets an immovable one?

title: Family Gbese
synopsis: Mazi's life is perfect—engaged to his dream girl and thriving at his high-powered investment firm. But a shocking request from his mentor threatens it all. Will he risk everything for the man who built his career or protect his perfect life?

title: Farmer's Bride
synopsis: In 1980s Ibadan, Funmi is forced into a marriage with Odun, a wealthy but lonely farmer. Though bound by duty, Funmi’s heart is elsewhere, and her resentment grows as she grapples with the life she never chose. Caught between a man she doesn’t love and one who sets her heart ablaze, she must navigate a choice that could have deadly consequences.

title: Fluid Lagos
synopsis: In three chapters, this film takes us through the Nigerian megacity of Lagos and explores its fluid side. The tour begins with boatman Osan, constantly moving, balancing on his waterway. In split screens we see the human body as a vessel containing water. Then we are chauffeured through the flowing traffic to the Lagos market and finally perform a water dance above the rooftops of the city. Interspersed are mobile phone videos of a young man on Tarkwa Bay Beach: The waves are good, the sun is shining. May the water bless us!

title: God's Wife
synopsis: A young widow struggles to reconcile her catholic beliefs with the demands of tradition after her late husband’s brother propositions her.

title: Guli
synopsis: Guli yearns for her mother's approval and dreams of attending university, but financial struggles hold her back—until she discovers a shocking family secret. Fueled by hurt and anger, she decides to carve her own path. As Guli navigates this new chapter, she must decide how her past will shape her present.
tagline: family, friendship, forgiveness

title: Hijack '93
synopsis: In an effort to dismantle their military-backed government, four men hijack an airplane, leveraging passengers onboard in the name of social change.

title: House of Ga'a
synopsis: At the height of the Oyo Empire, the ferocious Bashorun Ga'a became more powerful than the kings he enthroned, only to be undone by his own blood.

title: Infant at Heart
synopsis: A chief Judge struggles to mature from her expereinces as a child at a Convent school with a murder case threatening to eclise her fragile psyche.

title: It Blooms in June
synopsis: After a tragic loss, a father's protective bubble is challenged when his daughter seeks life's temptations.

title: Japa!
synopsis: Mezu discovers he's trapped in a time loop in Nigeria. To his surprise, his colleague Kamsi is in the same predicament. Together with their friends Tobe, Wasiu, and Sola, they must unite to break free.

title: Just the two of Us
synopsis: Two newly weds experience a variation of dramatic and emotional encounters until they find a common ground.

title: Kaka
synopsis: Duma, a farming community, is ravaged by banditry and a scarcity of potable drinking water.  Kaka, a schoolgirl from Duma village, is unhappy with her grandmother's traditional midwifery practice, which has led to the deaths of a few women in the village.  Will she give up on her aspirations as a young girl having escaped to the city, or can she reconnect with the path to her desired destination?
tagline: I am not free... Until we are all free

title: Kiitan's Transit
synopsis: A story about the transition from childhood to adulthood, about a curious 17-year-old teenager who longs to explore her interests in the arts, but must reconcile her desires with her dying mother's wishes for her to become a doctor.

title: Kill Boro
synopsis: A desperate son and debt-ridden father fight for their lives. Set in Azuama, a rustic town by the river, in an oil-rich state, “Kill Boro” tells the harrowing story of Elijah, a young boy burdened by his father Boro’s relentless brutality against him and his mother. Driven by desperation, Elijah seeks an unthinkable solution from a notorious gang leader.
tagline: Desperation Knows No Boundaries

title: KM17
synopsis: A young woman, worried about the chilling disappearance of her sister and loss of her mother, unwittingly steps into the nightmarish clutches of a disturbed taxi driver.
tagline: Your last ride is here.

title: Lakatabu
synopsis: When a man begins to use his powers for criminal activities, threatening the lives of citizens, his downfall becomes imminent when he kidnaps the daughter of the man who robbed him with power.

title: Leaving Ikorodu In 1999
synopsis: During a road trip to the airport, Fade questions whether her niece’s departure from Nigeria is truly for the best.

title: Lisabi: The Uprising
synopsis: The legendary story of a folk hero's rebellion against an oppressive empire, fighting for his freedom and forever altering the course of Yoruba history.

title: Miss PJ
synopsis: A young lady on a National Youth Service assignment becomes the saviour of a little town at the mercy of a mysterious killer.

title: Mothers of Chibok
synopsis: Following four Nigerian mothers as they fight to educate their children in the wake of tragedy.

title: Muri and Ko
synopsis: Muri, a petty thief, accidentally kidnaps 8-year-old Kole, a celebrity’s son. His attempts to sell the car and keep Kole safe spark a series of funny misadventures and an unlikely friendship.

title: On the Streets (of Lagos)
synopsis: Four years after the End SARS protest, Kayode returns to the streets of Lagos, Nigeria, in search of queer narratives embedded in the city's everyday life. Through the voices of a journalist, an incarcerated queer person, and a collective of trans and gender non-conforming individuals, On the Streets (of Lagos) reveals intimate stories of survival, community, grief, family, and hope within Nigeria's marginalized LGBTQ+ community.
tagline: A Lagos Street Queer Story

title: Once Upon a Honeymoon
synopsis: Two newlyweds, intensely in love, begin to struggle in the early days of marriage after running into a series of unforeseen issues during their honeymoon.

title: One Too Many
synopsis: Convinced of her son's innocence after he's charged with murder, a woman fights for his freedom against a corrupt and unjust system.

title: Pieces of Love
synopsis: Tobe’s life is put on hold after his relationship and work take a different turn.
tagline: Love is the whole thing. We are only pieces.

title: Rush Hour
synopsis: A young woman’s heart is torn between her musician boyfriend who is on the brink of fame, and a man who understands her more than anyone.

title: Salamatu’s Rhapsody
synopsis: A devout Muslim daughter, stands at a crossroads as her father's desire to honor his late mother clashes with her dream of becoming a rapper, challenging the bonds of family and tradition.

title: Shínà
synopsis: A taxi driver in bustling Lagos agrees to deliver a mysterious package in exchange for his dying mother's medical treatment.

title: Singleness Is Bliss
synopsis: Singleness is Bliss is a story of a woman who desired to be married but got caught up with the wrong men and some misogynistic cultural values that were against hers. As she navigates through life hurdles and her lecturing job, she soon finds out that singleness is indeed blissful for her.

title: Soft Love
synopsis: After being jilted on her wedding day, South African online relationship specialist, Zandi Jele, loses faith in love. However, when Nigerian photographer, Edward, crashes into Zandi's life, he fans her dying flames for love back to life.

title: Strawberry Chinny
synopsis: Chinny, a makeup artist, hits rock bottom when her year-long relationship ends, leaving her unemployed and homeless. She moves in with her best friend, Ifeanyi, who reluctantly takes her in and tries to help her rebuild her life. But Chinny can’t let go of her ex, Korode, spiraling into heartbreak—just as Ifeanyi’s relationship with his British girlfriend, Annie, adds tension to their friendship.

title: Suspicion
synopsis: A young man delves into the sinister world of black magic after the brutal murder of his best friend and his daughter. As he hunts for vengeance, he faces moral dilemmas and shocking betrayals that threaten to shatter his closest relationships. In this gripping tale of friendship, love and revenge, he must confront his newfound powers and decide how far he's willing to go to deliver justice.

title: The Beads
synopsis: Delve into the intricate dance of life and unresolved pain, where the facade of moving forward masks the storm within. As we grapple with the illusion that time will mend unaddressed wounds, fate intervenes, shattering our delusions. Join us on a poignant odyssey as we follow a young woman, ensnared in a paradox of life and longing for release.

title: The Evolution of Adire
synopsis: Explores the history, artistry, and global impact of Yoruba textiles, highlighting its cultural significance, evolving methods, and relevance in modern fashion

title: The Incredible Sensational Fiancée of Sèyí Àjàyí
synopsis: In the whimsical Pan-African society of Alkebulan, brilliant but overlooked scholar Dr. Constance Moumie discovers her fiancé, Sèyí Àjàyí, is secretly engaged to Princess Ada, sending the town into chaos. With the help of her best friend Bibi, she hatches a bold plan to expose her unfaithful lover at his engagement ceremony, seeking both justice and long-overdue recognition.

title: The Kids Are OK
synopsis: A whimsical journey through Nigeria's youth-driven ALTErnative creative scene.

title: The Legend of the Vagabond Queen of Lagos
synopsis: Jawu bears the mark of a warrior king but lives humbly, selling swallows at the local market, saving up for the better future she’s determined to build for herself and her son. The pair reside in the Agbojedo community, a floating slum planted in the lagoon that gives Lagos its name. Just as rumours begin circulating regarding government plans for new developments that would raze their homes, Jawu spies a corrupt politician burying a nest egg of cash. Struck by her good fortune, she takes the money for herself, thinking this might be her way out. Jawu doesn’t know that she is destined for a bigger battle that is yet to come.

title: The Man Died
synopsis: When an idealistic writer is jailed by the military after his mediation to stop a civil war is misconstrued as support for the rebels, his ideals are put to the ultimate test as he battles for his sanity and his life.
tagline: Inspired by the prison memoir of Wole Soyinka

title: The Silent Intruder
synopsis: A married couple grapples with the challenges of a deteriorating sexual relationship. Frustrated by their struggles, they decide to consult a psychologist for assistance. Soon, the psychologist’s motives take a dark turn as manipulation becomes a tool to infiltrate the wife’s life.

title: The Wager
synopsis: A dying cancer patient—whose life had been forfeit by his own actions—experiences a brutal battle between the Angel of Death, coming to devour his soul, and the Angel of Light, who wants his soul restored for a greater assignment.

title: The Waiter
synopsis: Happy-go-lucky but down-on-his-luck Akpos resumes at Crystal Hotel for a day-job as a waiter. He has been hired by a private firm as part of the catering team for the Minister of Poverty Alleviation and her well-heeled colleagues who are launching a scheme to aid the poor.

title: The Weekend
synopsis: This gripping Nigerian thriller will keep you guessing until the very last moment with its unique take on the age-old question: what’s wrong with the in-laws? ​

title: This is Love
synopsis: This is Love tells the romance stories of 3 Nigerian LGBTQ+ couples and how they navigate romantic relationships in a conservative and hostile Nigerian environment. It is an attempt to humanize LGBTQ+ people in Nigeria by telling a story of how they find love amidst the risks and struggles.  The cast includes a lesbian couple, a gay couple and a couple made up of a transman and a ciswoman. It covered conversations around acceptance, religion, health, the Same-Sex Marriage Prohibition Act (SSMPA), and finding love. 2 out of the 3 couples wore masks and had their voices distorted. Aside from helping to conceal the identity of the cast, the mask and distorted voices are also symbolic of the double life LGBTQ+ Nigerians have to live for their safety and security.
tagline: This is Love tells the romance stories of 3 Nigerian LGBTQ+ couples and how they navigate romantic relationships in a conservative and hostile Nigerian  environment.

title: Timini
synopsis: Timini, a seasoned assassin with a traumatic past, takes on a final job: killing the child of a drug cartel boss. During the mission, Timini encounters a young woman and develops a connection. Completed, but Timini's past haunts him.

title: Tòkunbọ̀
synopsis: An ex-car smuggler is given three hours to deliver a government official's daughter to her captor — or else his family will suffer the consequences.
tagline: The less you know, the better.

title: UNO: The F in Family
synopsis: On Junior’s nineteenth birthday, his father Uzu pays a surprise visit at his department, and discovers that Junior has not only been skipping classes but also running a comics blog. Uzu gives an ultimatum between his dream or the law degree and familial support. Junior chooses the former, so Uzu sends him packing. That was the last time Junior’s family saw or heard from him.

title: Unrepentant
synopsis: A sibling rivalry story that brews from intense selfless love between Ivie and Omoefe to bitter sour relationship. How far could you go for family? At what expense? Let’s find out where it all went wrong between these two sisters.

title: Venj
synopsis: A psychological thriller about a group of friends whose friendly reunion conference call turns deadly.
tagline: Five friends...one deadly secret.

title: Water & Garri
synopsis: Aisha makes an emotional return to her hometown in Nigeria, after spending 10 years in the US becoming a successful entrepreneur. She is met by the tensions and challenges which come after spending time away from her family and friends.

title: Wedding Night Blues
synopsis: Nosa and Wonuola are newly weds who made a vow to remain celibate until their wedding night, hoping it would be the most beautiful night of their lives.

title: Wèrè
synopsis: A homeless woman's sole source for food and comfort suddenly disappears, forcing her to endure the indignities and prejudices of urban society as she struggles to survive.
tagline: Don't look away.

title: Where the Heck Is My Period?
synopsis: This documentary follows the journeys of 11 African women who struggle with polycystic ovarian syndrome. PCOS, a hormonal disorder that can cause irregular periods alongside unwanted physical symptoms, affects 1 in 10 women of childbearing age worldwide. This film highlights the struggles caused by the syndrome through interviews with gynecologists, pastors, public figures, and native African doctors.

title: Wives on Strike: The Uprising
synopsis: An honor graduate is kidnapped upon returning home. Driven by vengeance, his mother embarks on a bloody quest to rescue him, plunging into a violent and grisly ordeal.
tagline: They struck first, but the wives struck last...

title: Ye!
synopsis: In YE!, Stellar joins a celestial league of women who accompany her on her quest for revenge after her family is brutally murdered by child soldiers.

title: Zion: A Short Film
synopsis: A struggling teenage girl in Mainland Lagos discovers new hope in the presence of God. Based on the book of poems, "ZION," by June Olu.

title: 14 Years and a Day
synopsis: When a discontented young woman has a big fight with her partner of 14 years, she meets someone who makes her question the course of her relationship.

title: A Bag of Trouble
synopsis: After receiving a token of appreciation from a wealthy politician, a young man’s life takes a tumble. Realizing the burden of being rich, he must now stand up and fight the evil he perceives are closing in or slide back into a world of poverty he knows too well.

title: A Green Fever
synopsis: Things get unnerving when a suave realtor and his sick daughter take refuge in a mysterious mansion after a medical emergency in the middle of nowhere.

title: A Song from the Dark
synopsis: Ashionye, a reluctant Nigerian Shaman living in the south of England, who has been hired by an old family friend, Isioma Williams, to investigate and expel a malevolent spirit that has been tormenting her family after the death of her estranged husband, Magnus. To the chagrin of her demon hunting partner, Marv Taylor, Ashionye reluctantly accepts the job as a way to repay an old debt she owes Isioma. As Ashionye digs deeper into Isioma’s family situation, she finds  herself standing against a familiar force that brought about her trauma since childhood.
tagline: Even death has a song.

title: A Study on Love
synopsis: An experimental documentary art piece that explores the topic of love in an elementary fashion.

title: A Sunday Affair
synopsis: Two best friends, Uche and Toyin, fall in love with Sunday, a charming, yet flawed eligible bachelor. A love triangle ensues with the women unaware that they are dating the same man.

title: A Taste of Sin
synopsis: Faith, forgiveness, redemption and hope. Two pastors, poles apart, navigate their temptations -- one tempted by money, and the other by desire.

title: A Tribe Called Judah
synopsis: With the help of their mother, the Judah boys plan to rob a small mall. But when they arrive, they're met by real armed robbers.

title: A Weekend to Forget
synopsis: Seven friends reunite for a weekend getaway after years of being apart. But things aren't as smooth as they hoped, as old tensions and unresolved issues resurface.

title: Ada Omo Daddy
synopsis: The stability of her family is threatened when she receives an unexpected call from her long-lost ex-husband on her daughter’s introduction day.  The bride world comes crashing down as she learns that her loving daddy is not her biological father, and she is torn between loyalty to the man who raised her and her new connection to the man who birth her

title: Áfàméfùnà: An Nwa Boi Story
synopsis: In the heart of Nnewi in Anambra State, genial billionaire, Afamefuna Okoli, and his radiant wife Amaka, throw a lavish funeral party for Afam's deceased father. In the midst of the mega shinding, officers of the Nigerian Police arrive and privately invite Afam's to the station.

title: Aje and Bruja
synopsis: A supernatural thriller in which two women who wield the ancient African spiritual power of the 'Aje' (Powerful Mothers) go on an avenging mission.

title: Àkúdàáyà
synopsis: A Man, His fate and a rare second chance. What will he do with it?

title: All the Colours of the World Are Between Black and White
synopsis: Bambino and Bawa meet in Lagos and hit it off immediately. During their long trips around the city they develop a deep affection for each other. But in a society which considers homosexuality taboo, they feel the pressure of social norms.

title: All The Places I Once Loved You
synopsis: A woman navigates loss by reliving her former routines with the “ghost” of her former lover.

title: Baby Maker
synopsis: Nasa, a successful 31-year-old, faces a life-altering challenge when her doctor advises conceiving soon after a myomectomy. Pressured by her biological clock, she proposes an unconventional solution to her best friend Mofe: fathering her child through IVF. Their tight-knit friendship is tested as they navigate this complex journey. When IVF fails, they resort to natural conception, blurring the lines between friendship and intimacy. As Nasa finally becomes pregnant, unexpected emotions surface, threatening their bond. Caught between the joy of impending parenthood and the fear of losing their most treasured relationship, Nasa and Mofe must confront their true feelings. They're forced to redefine their connection and face the possibility that their friendship might evolve into something more – or be lost forever. "BABY MAKER" is a poignant exploration of modern relationships, societal pressures, and the transformative power of parenthood.
tagline: Desperate to have a baby, Nasa convinces her best friend Mofe to father her child.

title: Bad Cop
synopsis: BAD COP follows the life of a corrupt Policeman, INSPECTOR TAFARI. The story tells of how he aids many criminals in carrying out their criminal activities in his territory and further encourages them by partnering with them for financial gain. He would go as far as burning criminal case files to remain in favour with drug lords. As the story proceeds, TAFARI falls in love with a lady named MIA, who changes his life's trajectory.

title: Bank Alert
synopsis: A down on his luck (50s), former banker gets the shock of his life when he discovers N500 million naira in his dormant bank account, an immediate target is set on his back when he withdraws the money.

title: Bathroom
synopsis: A man's voyeuristic tendencies take a deadly turn when his harmless peeping tom activities turn into a murder investigation.

title: Big Love
synopsis: A romantic drama, Big Love explores the eruption of love between Adil, a young and passionate man chasing his dreams and Adina, a focused and independent woman making ends meet at a graduate training camp.

title: Blood Vessel
synopsis: Brought together by chance, six people fleeing a town devastated by oil pollution stow away on a mysterious ship — not realizing the dangers that await.

title: Breaking Cord
synopsis: Tonna and Emelia's love faces a test when her friends urge her to leave him due to his deformity, sparking a tale of love, betrayal, and truth.

title: Breath of Life
synopsis: Timi, a gifted clergyman turns into an old lonely curmudgeon when his family is tragically taken from him. Until Elijah, a humble man with big dreams of becoming a priest, comes into his life. Through Elijah, Timi not only learns to live again, but also realizes purpose for all his gifts and wealth.

title: Cash & Carry
synopsis: Four female housemates team up with a notorious gangster to swindle the son of a prominent Nigerian industrialist of his newly acquired inheritance, but their plan goes horribly wrong.

title: Dark October
synopsis: After being accused of theft, four university students in Nigeria were killed in a mob attack that sparked nationwide outrage. Based on a true story.

title: Deity
synopsis: The Rogue King is coming!!

title: Disconnect: The Wedding Planner
synopsis: After falling victim to a scam, a desperate man races the clock as he attempts to plan a luxurious destination wedding for an important investor.

title: Endless Love
synopsis: Movie Overviewn and Synopsis. : Adaku is a faithful wife who suffered in marriage.,though married early,life didn’t offer her much to rejoice about

title: Exceptional Beings
synopsis: Two Immortal Gods, Athena and Hermes, who have lived on earth for over 4000 years, find out that there is much to the planet than they have always believed, when then come into contact with Mina, a woman who makes them question their own reality.

title: Experimental Film No. 1
synopsis: On a day in the field, a young woman questions her relationship when she catches a man taking photos of her.
tagline: No. 1

title: Experimental Film No. 1
synopsis: On a day in the field, a young woman questions her relationship when she catches a man taking photos of her.
tagline: No. 1

title: FLES
synopsis: A young man sits at a local restaurant with his friend: but he isn't paying attention to her as she speaks. This film visualizes his chaotic state of mind and how he uses mindfulness practice to tune back into the conversation. Mindfulness is being able to sit with and observe your thoughts. Being mindful improves focus and mental health.  FLES is SELF spelt backwards.

title: Gangs of Lagos
synopsis: A group of friends who each have to navigate their own destiny, growing up on the bustling streets and neighborhood of Isale Eko, Lagos.

title: Hanky Panky
synopsis: Osas and her friends are in traffic at Falomo when Aunty Yuwa calls. The conversation that follows touches on family, religion, social identities and same sex relationships. Created by Opemipo Aikomo and Daniel Orubo.

title: Haywire
synopsis: When lovebirds Nifemi and Swell elope after the former's parents disapprove of their relationship, Nifemi's parents lock her up in their mansion. Swell and his friends fake a robbery in order to rescue Nifemi, but things don't go exactly as planned.

title: Help Me
synopsis: High school girls are dropping out of school for no apparent reason. Rumor has it that the girls have been raped and traumatized but the school and the local authorities do nothing to investigate the cases. When Yemisi's best friend Adeola becomes a victim, the young aspiring investigative journalist takes it upon herself to uncover the truth.
tagline: Don't be scared.

title: Her Perfect Life
synopsis: Every woman in Lagos, wants to be like Onajide Ibrahim - she has the perfect life. At 39 years old, she has achieved what most women twenty years older would be proud of - a flourishing career, a popular and growing small business, a loving husband and two bright and beautiful children. So why does she want to end it all?

title: Here Love Lies
synopsis: In the pursuit of 'love and forever', single parent and Travel Blogger Amanda, embarks on a social media romance with American TourGuide Michael. A trip to the US to meet up for the first time, opens up more doors than both anticipated.

title: Hooked
synopsis: Ghanaian & Nigerian diplomatic drama spill over and express through love & violence

title: Ichi: Marks in Time
synopsis: In 1911, anthropologist Northcote Thomas made a study of the Igbo-speaking people of Nigeria. 110 years later, the return of Thomas’s photographs of men with facial scarification marks called ‘ichi’ inspired a cultural revival among the custodians of this controversial art form. In this creative documentary, made collaboratively with the community, the descendants of those photographed tell the story of their ancestors’ migrations and their profession as traditional ‘tattooers’.

title: Ìjọ̀gbọ̀n
synopsis: Four teenagers from a rural village in South West Nigeria stumble upon a pouch of uncut diamonds — but before long, others come looking for the bounty.

title: Imade
synopsis: When Imade decides to look for a job to support her hardworking husband, she is met with a side of him she thought was long buried.
tagline: A Story about Domestic Violence

title: Ixora
synopsis: Chuma Eze is an opinionated, feminist journalist in the running for a prestigious women’s award. When her boss (Jia) asks her to interview Iziegbe “Izi”, who is also a contender for the same award, Chuma reluctantly takes on the job. She soon discovers that there is more to Izi than meets the eye.

title: Jagun Jagun
synopsis: A young man determined to become a powerful warrior joins an elite army, encountering the wrath of a maniacal warlord and the love of a fierce woman.

title: Kate
synopsis: Trapped in a cycle of abuse, Kate's mind conjures an unseen ally—a mysterious voice that unveils her hidden strength.
tagline: You can’t hide from the truth

title: Le diable est dans la maison
Love and Life
synopsis: A heartbroken recent widow, a marriage in trouble, and an uncertain romance... These three women, friends from way back when, may seem to live perfect lives in a perfect world but recently they have all struggled to remember love and to keep love alive. They learn, that when everything else fails, as long as you have your friends you have hope.

title: Malaika
synopsis: A frustrated and bitter woman, struggling to have a child of her own, tries to find spiritual guidance.

title: Mami Wata
synopsis: In the oceanside village of Iyi, the revered Mama Efe acts as an intermediary between the people and the all-powerful water deity Mami Wata. But when a young boy is lost to a virus, Efe’s devoted but rebellious daughter Zinwe and skeptical protégé Prisca warn Efe about unrest among the villagers. With the sudden arrival of a mysterious rebel deserter named Jasper, a conflict erupts, leading to a violent clash of ideologies and a crisis of faith for the people of Iyi.
tagline: A West Afrikan Folktale

title: Married to Work
synopsis: To save their real estate agency, an ambitious businesswoman and her entitled boss must convince an investor they're married -- despite hating each other.

title: Merry Men 3: Nemesis
synopsis: The film tells the story of four Abuja’s most eligible and notorious bachelors. Their lives are wrapped in flamboyancy with their network and thriving businesses, fast cars, luxury homes, and the women in their lives in exc

title: Mikolo
synopsis: Two children befriend a magical creature and must help it to return to its forest home.

title: My Wife
synopsis: Kunle works as a driver in the wealthy part of Lagos in Nigeria. One night as with every other night, he drives his boss home and makes his way home to his own family. As he arrives home, a horror awaits him. His wife, Eniola seems to have gone mad, hallucinating, screaming at their children and neighbours in the cramped housing accommodation they all live in.

title: Onye Egwu
synopsis: Life as Alex knows it is about to end.football is his life, he will go on a spiritual journey to reclaim his place in the sport he loves so much. Then his world collides with a young talented upcoming footballer with dreams of playing abroad.

title: Osoronga
synopsis: He ran because he had no other choice. He feared what would happen if he dared to stop. There was no time to think. There was hardly any time for him to breathe. On his broken ankle, he ran. With his bruised arms, he ran. With his bleeding sides, he ran because he knew today was the day he was meant to die.

title: Over the Bridge
synopsis: Compromised by a corporate scandal, will he jump over the edge or can he find redemption? Folarin is a Lagos based investment banker with something to hide. Plagued by an alcohol problem and intermittent panic attacks, his life is turned upside down when his ethics are compromised over a controversial rail construction project. As his relationship with his glamourous society wife Jumoke unravels he finds himself sinking deeper into an illegal high stakes business deal. When his actions lead to the death of a colleague in an environment where corruption is the name of the game, he is plunged further into crisis facing pressure on all fronts. Narrated with suspense and intrigue, Over the Bridge is a rare treat from Nigeria, depicting the west African metropolis, Lagos as never seen before on the big screen.

title: Runner
synopsis: Runner is a crime drama about two siblings, Ayomide & Nifemi. Ayomide,a sex worker, tries to leave her job under Madam Ruth, after facing abuse in the hands of Stone, a gangster and customer who is obsessed with her.

title: Sace
synopsis: A journey into the world of sex traffickers and terrorists

title: Small Talk
synopsis: Baba Dee's boss and wife are robbed, fueling his determination to find the culprit. Officer Okoh, an adept investigator, takes on the challenge, unraveling a suspenseful plot with unexpected twists.

title: Something Like Gold
synopsis: Hilarious and heartwarming story of two strangers who meet at a gold shop and end up falling in love. But their relationship is not as smooth as they hope, as they have to deal with family drama, cultural differences, and a gold heist gone wrong

title: Swimming in a Sea of Trauma
synopsis: A ghost story with nightmarish echoes concerning the traumatic memories of the Nigerian Civil War.

title: The Black Book
synopsis: After his son is wrongly accused of kidnapping, a deacon who has just lost his wife takes matters into his own hands and fights a crooked police gang to clear him.

title: The Bride Price
synopsis: “The Bride Price” follows the story of a barely educated spare parts dealer who cuts off his wife’s family from their lives after he was made to pay through his nose for her.

title: The House of Secrets
synopsis: A sheltered woman's past comes back to haunt her when she's thrown in jail for being an accomplice to her spy lover, and 20 years later, a group rescue her from jail and sets up a semblance of her old house to make her remember a secret number her spy lover hid with her.
tagline: “What don’t you like about trains?”

title: The King
synopsis: A legendary deity who defends the poor squares off with a ruthless police chief when he reincarnates as a crime boss devoted to wealth redistribution.

title: The Trade
synopsis: This is the story of a notoriously cunning kidnapper known only by name, who has ravaged the southern part of Nigeria for over a decade. 'Eric' undertakes a job that brings the law closer than ever before. Inspired by true events.
tagline: Based on True Events

title: The Wedding Weekend
synopsis: Gabby and Marvin's wedding weekend turns dramatic instead of joyful as Marvin's past interrupts their big day. Marvin has to reconcile with his father to please his soon to be wife. His ex-girlfriend resurfaces, hellbent on disrupting the already planned wedding between the soon to be couples.

title: This Is Lagos
synopsis: A young man chasing superstardom in a city filled with masked people in one way or the other, as it explores the hustle and bustle of living in a city like Lagos.

title: Tì ẹ Ńbọ̀
synopsis: A short film that centers around Feranmi, a 19-year-old lad who struggles to grapple with his feelings for his friend, Tolulope. His father, who does not agree with these changes, goes to extreme lengths to ensure that his son returns to "his" definition of normal.

title: To Freedom
synopsis: Tobi and Shola are at the peak of their five year marriage and are still as in love as when they were newlyweds, until Shola's disappearance one rainy night led to Tobi being admitted into an asylum.

title: Torn
synopsis: A young woman seeks therapy regarding her anisotropic partner, only to get an undesired response from her therapist.
tagline: Until she decides it's enough.

title: Violet
synopsis: Faced with the pressure of delivering on her job, Violet, a young woman in her 20s, deals with the complication of turning down the romantic advances from her biggest customer—an older family man. This complication goes up a notch when she finds herself falling in love with his son.

title: With Love from Bayelsa
synopsis: With Love From Bayelsa is a riveting valentine themed story that centers on a fisherman named Tarella and his lover Ebiye.
tagline: English

title: Yearning
synopsis: Two former lovers reunite years after their breakup, and uncomfortably struggle to acknowledge the complicated feelings between them.
tagline: What happens when the body betrays the heart?

synopsis: An epic love story of a young couple's struggles in dealing with mental health issues and societal reactions to this situation. Based on true events, it's a story of strength, love, determination, laced with humor.

title: A Simple Lie
synopsis: When Boma tries to win back her ex by telling him that she has cancer, her simple lie soon spirals out of control.

title: Afterlife
synopsis: Afterlife is a documentary that explores How Colonization Changed Nigeria’s Spiritual and Cultural Identity. We see the ancient Bori religion practiced in Hausa communities before the Islamic invasion, uncovering its spiritual significance and the forces that led to its decline. It also examines the surviving indigenous religions and cultural traditions in today’s southwestern Yoruba and eastern Igbo communities, revealing how they have endured despite centuries of external influence.

title: Almajiri
synopsis: THE ALMAJIRI is a movie that is based on true stories as it affects millions of children in Nigeria and other countries who are victims of trafficking and other forms of child slavery as we saw with Nafisat and Salihu, two young children who were separated from their parents from childhood by the cruel business of Alhaji Makarfi. The gullible villagers believe him, love him and even revere him higher than the chiefs in the North. He is showered with gifts, praise, some villagers even go the extra mile to sell their valuables to offer him bribes just to get their wards enlisted for his scholarship scheme, unknown to them that none of their children ever gets to see the wall of a school let alone have the liberty of pursuing a trade. They are beaten, brainwashed and force to become prostitutes, suicide bombers and ALMAJIRIS.

title: Amazing Sisters
synopsis: A Nollywood story of three young sisters who use their wits to stop a group of thieves trying to break into their home to steal away their family's diamond.

title: Aníkúlápó
synopsis: After an affair with a queen leads to his demise, an eager traveler encounters a mystical bird with the power to give him another life.
tagline: He who has death in his pouch.

title: Awaiting Trial
synopsis: Awaiting Trial is a documentary that follows the lives of 3 people held unjustly by the Nigerian Police - some disappeared or died. It explores this unique blend of injustice and inequity that led to the global #EndSARs protests. But this story is not just about those systemic injustices; it is about the lives, families and communities that they have destroyed - and continue to destroy.

title: Ayinla
synopsis: Set against the backdrop of a beautiful range of hills and valleys in the southwestern Nigerian countryside, AYINLA is inspired by the life and times of Ayinla Omowura, a popular Yoruba musician in rural Nigeria.

title: Battle on Buka Street
synopsis: After a lifetime of rivalry, two women find themselves at loggerheads once again when they set up food businesses on the same street.

title: Black Mail
synopsis: A high-octane thriller in which London-based actor Chinda becomes embroiled in a sextortion lawsuit brought by a criminal oligarch and digital fraudster.
tagline: They're watching you right now.

title: Brotherhood
synopsis: After years of fighting to survive on the streets of Lagos, two brothers fall on opposite sides of the law. The bonds of brotherhood are put to the ultimate test as one joins a Taskforce that hunts down the other and his gang.

title: Cake
synopsis: A baker becomes infatuated with one of his customers and tries to bake a special cake for her before he can express his feelings.

title: Country Love
synopsis: Kambili returns home after fifteen years when his sister, Nneka, writes him a heartfelt letter of reconciliation. Upon his return, Kambili is confronted by the bitter-sweet memories of his childhood, his estranged relationship with his family, and his affection for his boyhood friend, Ifediora

title: Cowboy
synopsis: Across a two-channel video installation, voice, image, and sound combine to produce a meditative exploration into the story of a man named Cowboy. His background is marked by migration and shaped by his love for the equestrian, as he recounts a lifetime spent in service to horses. On the right channel we see the leaves of a palm tree rustling against a blue sky, alternated with images of the ocean. On the left, we follow the protagonist as he tends to and rides his horse. The strength and autonomy of the animal finds a compliment in the rider - a mutual responsibility develops and each grows to intuit movements of the other. As Cowboy reaches the sea, the two screens sonically coalesce. The cargo ships in the far distance are a reminder of the global economic trade central to Nigeria’s past and its future – as well as darker histories of exploitation, undocumented migration, and the shadow of forced displacement amid the transatlantic slave trade.

title: Dinner at My Place
synopsis: A man sets out to propose to his Girlfriend over dinner just as his ex-girlfriend unexpectedly shows up.

title: Elesin Oba: The King's Horseman
synopsis: Inspired by true life events, in the Oyo Empire in the 1940's, Elesin Oba, the king's chief horseman, succumbs to the lure of beauty and sexual desire on the very evening he is set to die in order to fulfil his lifelong debt of ritual suicide to accompany the dead Alaafin to the realm of the ancestors, he derails from a very important generational and spiritual transaction. This sets in motion a series of catastrophic consequences, in a spell-binding film of emotions, humour, and tragic role reversals that puts ancient beliefs and customs on trial in an ever increasingly post-modern and Western world.

title: Finding Hubby 2
synopsis: After discovering her fiancee's secret, a woman finds herself at a crossroads between a shallow marriage and the return to the chaotic world of dating.

title: Glamour Girls
synopsis: Their life as luxury escorts offered these women glamour, money and a chance to reinvent themselves…until a murder and a robbery ruined everything.

title: Guardian Angel
synopsis: Between Lagos and London, the artist recalls her grandmother and her childhood to explore faith, grief, and memory in postcolonial Nigeria.

title: Happy Ending
synopsis: The story of two rape survivors (a gay man and a heterosexual woman) who bond after realizing they shared something in common. However, fate plays a trick on them when their perpetrator walks back into their lives.

title: Hey, You!
synopsis: The life of an awkward 32 years old software engineer is turned upside down when he finds out the girl he wants to be with is the FANSALONE model he obsesses over and she’s his next-door neighbour.

title: Intermission
synopsis: Set in socially conservative Nigeria, against the backdrop of a 2014 law that criminalises same-sex relationships, Intermission is the story of one young man's quest to do right by society while seeking no more than the space to love who he loves.

title: Jolly Roger
synopsis: One fateful night, an encounter at a police checkpoint manned by two drunk Officers sets off a chain of events that turns Brume and Najite's blissful lives upside down and leads them on a journey of greed, deception and murder.  Directed by
tagline: A date with karma

title: Kamanni
synopsis: Khalid (Ramadan Booth) returns home after a long trip and find his girlfriend Deeja (Nafisa Abdullahi) missing in a brothel where she is in the custody of Magajiya (Fatima Isa Makamashi), he violently begins a quest for her whereabout which leads him to the home of an influential man Alh Kabir (Ali Nuhu). His curiousness and edgy nature lead to a journey that makes him discover some events that left him shocked

title: King Of Thieves
synopsis: King of thieves is an epic tale of Agesinkole, an all-powerful Bandit and his reign of terror in the prosperous Kingdom of Ajeromi. Concerned by his pillaging, the kingdom moves to destroy him, through the hunters, witches and priests, thus beginning this adventurous saga of revenge, bravery and glory.

title: Kofa
synopsis: Beyond the locked door of a room in which eight people without memories are trapped, lies the truth about their identity, but to recover it, they have to evade a maniacal murderer.

title: Memories Unforgotten
synopsis: Strong willed, Buchi and Lara reluctantly find themselves falling in love with each other. Can they each overcome their own pride and prejudice?

title: My Blood
synopsis: After her estranged father’s death, Oluchi , an upcoming musician is forced to confront her true self and past mistakes. She reconnects with her daughter through their love for music. However, the echoes from the past spring from every corner, threatening to bring them down.

title: No U-Turn
synopsis: As a young man, director Ike Nnaebue left Nigeria intending to take the route via Benin, Mali, and Mauritania to Morocco - but he was forced to turn back earlier, and never made it to Europe. In his first documentary, No U-Turn, he retraces the life-changing journey he made over 20 years ago. Along the way, he meets those who are taking the same trip and, through conversations with them, tries to understand what motivates young people today to expose themselves to the dangers of a passage into an uncertain future. Most are aware of the dangers of traveling undocumented by road, yet more and more are joining the ranks of those who take this risk. Overlaid with a powerful poetic commentary and insight into the long-reaching impact of a colonial past, this self-reflective travelogue unpacks the deep longing of an entire generation in search of opportunities.

title: Oath Keepers
synopsis: Four close friends that turned to brothers took an oath to uphold their commitments to the Bro. Code which is a huge significant in their business syndicate. Three strong rules are not allowed in the brotherhood. But when love sets in among the brothers. Rules are bound to be broken and the consequences become a Nightmare that triggers the "CODE RED".

title: Ogun Óla: War is Coming
synopsis: Follow Óla, a teenager who suddenly discovers that he is the reincarnation of a demigod, as he now needs to face his recently found destiny.

title: One Bad Turn
synopsis: When a once loving and adorable wife decides to go a different route in what would be considered a perfect marriage.the consequences of her actions will leave behind a trail of lust,pain,betrayal and an emptiness beyond any imagination.

title: Otiti
synopsis: A seamstress with commitment issues takes care of the ailing father who had abandoned her as a child while her half- brothers position themselves to take over his property.
tagline: Letting go of the past to make way for the future.

title: Palava!
synopsis: A legendary musician's life and family are turned upside down when a scandal is revealed on the eve of his 60th birthday.

title: Passport
synopsis: A rich brat must work together with a “ghetto” tomboy if he wants to recover his stolen passport; or he would miss a flight to a life-changing interview.

title: Samaria
synopsis: A young girl is faced with a huge change that could derail her chance at an education. With the assistance of an unlikely helper, she attempts to keep her life and future on track.

title: Save the Princess
synopsis: An arrogant village flutist finds favor in the eyes of the Princess but blunders his chance. Will he win her back?

title: Sip
synopsis: A 3D short film that explores the life of an artist, his enduring struggle, his guilty pleasures, deadlines and timelines. It is a story about the melee every creative faces in a fast paced world.

title: Sistá
