synopsis: Blood means nothing to the Salami-Bangura siblings, what they desire is power and they would gladly kill each other to get it. The opportunity presents itself upon the death of their parents, leaving the Salami-Bangura empire up for grabs. When the children come together for the first time in years to plan the funeral of their parents, betrayals and ulterior motives become order in their household.

title: Daughters of Donald
synopsis: Chief Donald intends to spend the rest of his life in perfect celibacy. But his adventurous past eventually catches up with him, when he suddenly discovers he fathered many children with several women during the days of his youth.

title: Double Mama 2
synopsis: Double Mama 2 continues the story of a strong, outspoken woman whose intimidating reputation keeps her community on edge. Known for her fiery personality and no-nonsense attitude, Double Mama’s presence affects everyone around her, especially as her family and neighbors navigate the consequences of her dominance and sharp tongue.

title: Excess Luggage
synopsis: A poor village couple are forced to stay with the husband's rich cousin and his family, creating a clash of cultures.

title: Film #1
synopsis: Sean's version of a film written by David.
tagline: IS THIS SELF AWARE?

title: Film 1 - Max
synopsis: This is Max's version of David's script Film 1
tagline: is this self aware?

title: Film 1 - Max
synopsis: This is Max's version of David's script Film 1
tagline: is this self aware?

title: Funny Universe
synopsis: Ese has a striking resemblance to Mrs. Bucknor's lost daughter, Mrs. Bucknor's protege Festus employs Ese to pretend to be Mrs. Bucknor's long lost granddaughter so he can steal all of her wealth.

title: Ghost Story
synopsis: Somto is found battered inside his crashed car. After his burial in Lagos he is found alive and married in another city Enugu. Could it be that his ghost is existing or could his death and burial have been all planned?

title: Harmattan
synopsis: Survival and paranoia will be the forces that destroy a bond between two recruits when their camp's only source of water runs out.
tagline: Harmattan

title: Mama Nike - Queen of Adire
synopsis: A vivid portrait of Chief Nike Davies-Okundaye, affectionately known as Mama Nike, a legendary Nigerian textile artist and cultural icon. The film explores her journey from humble beginnings to becoming an internationally celebrated ambassador of Adire (indigo-dyed cloth), and her tireless work in preserving traditional techniques while empowering women through art.

title: One: A Film By Givin
synopsis: Up and coming snow producer Keegan Valaika presents “One”. A true snowboarding movie for snowboarders, by snowboarders. It’s a riders film showcasing real snowboarding and the lifestyle that comes along with it. Follow Keegan and his crew as they take on last winter. This unique look at a dedicated group of riders is sure to entertain and inspire you to get out and ride. Sit back and enjoy the GIVIN Vid “One”.
tagline: A true snowboarding movie that showcases real snowboarding and the lifestyle that comes along with it. This unique look at a dedicated group of riders is sure to entertain and inspire you to get out and ride.

title: One: The Animated Film
synopsis: ONE is a heartfelt and action-packed film about an athlete's transition from elite competition to life beyond sports. It follows one person's quest for meaning, purpose, and identity, showcasing the universal struggle and sense of loss when leaving organized sports behind.

title: Phoenix Fury
synopsis: When Ewura-Ama, recently widowed, inherits Utopia Valley, a luxury resort tucked in the quiet hills of Ghana, her search for solitude is disrupted by the arrival of a high-profile guest. Their uneasy encounter stirs tensions that awaken secrets buried decades ago.

title: Prabhat Nagari - Film 1
synopsis: A reflection on celluloid dreams, fathers and sons, and the cyclical universe presented as a portrait of the erstwhile Prabhat Studio through the reunion of some of its oldest workers.

title: Silent Verses
synopsis: A stuttering young boy, pressured by his father, finds solace in his bicycle—until a troubled boy steals it, leading to an unlikely friendship.
tagline: Two boys, a bicycle, and the road to understanding.

title: Son of Iron
synopsis: The story follows Kunle, a talented teenager whose father, Rotimi Ogundele, insists he becomes a lawyer to fulfill the father's own unfulfilled dream. Kunle is a gifted tinkerer with a passion for repairing things, which creates a conflict between parental aspirations and his own destiny.
tagline: Torn between two worlds

title: Space Sitting Prowess of Egungun Ajomogbodo
synopsis: The name Ajoko-mo-gbe-odo (the one who sits without need for stool) is said to have been given in the ancient time when all Egungun in Ogbomoso openly perform for the king, Soun of Ogbomoso. After their performance, other Egungun would sit on stool but this precise Egungun choose to be different by sitting without a stool. Since then, the onlookers began to call it Ajoko-mo-gbe-odo and was later shortened to Ajomogbodo for easy pronunciation. This is a documentary that tells the story and shows the performance of Ajomogbodo, a mystical Egungun that sits comfortably on space without the use of a chair or stool.
tagline: Egungun Ajomogbodo

title: Spiraling
synopsis: On the brink of a historic election, tech founder Sade's impulsive affair leads to a web of deception, a mysterious death, and a relentless quest for justice.

title: The Betrayed
synopsis: No Plot Available

title: The Quick Fly
synopsis: Young outgoing Lucia is so desperate to explore the outside world, that she feels so depressed under her brother's watch cause she was being forced to become an introvert she wasn't. As soon as she got her admission into the high institution, it became a perfect time for her to explore the world.
tagline: Quick Fly

title: Third Floor Pigu
synopsis: On the mysterious third floor of a hotel, love, terror, and survival intertwine as an unknown, malicious force begins hunting its occupants, leaving a trail of blood and fear. Amidst the chaos, Dalima, a Ugandan gentleman, and Nana, his Tanzanian beloved, must confront the horrors that test their bond and their will to survive.
